name: /invoices on a fresh account renders cleanly with zero invoices
description: Brand-new account: no contracts signed, so no invoices exist. The /invoices hero, KPI strip, three tracks (Overdue / In flight / Paid), and right-rail cards must all read as 'waiting' rather than 'broken'. The hero subtitle should NOT say 'Nothing past due' — it should welcome the user.

persona.name: Marcus Lee
persona.context: Hasn't sent a quote yet, let alone an invoice. Just exploring.

preconditions: Account has zero contracts and zero invoices

steps.expect: Hero renders without empty-state title-tail bug (no awkward two-line break on the headline)
All four cells read $0 / 0 with friendly sub-labels; uses .qkpi grid (canonical) NOT .qkpis outer + .qkpi item (post-audit fix)
Each track is collapsed by default; header + chevron visible; clicking expands inline; counts read '0 invoices'

evaluationCriteria.check: Hero, KPIs, and three tracks share the same card width — no orphan margins from the 4-cell vs 4-cell-grid mismatch
Reads as 'we're ready when you are' — not 'we showed you scaffolding'
QuoteTrack island is the canonical one (header + chevron + body-inner); count label uses unit='invoice'
Track headers are real <button>s with aria-expanded; keyboard space/enter toggles
